channel.title: Ufologist on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Ufologist on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Integratron
item.description:
The Integratron is a cupola structure in Landers, California, designed by ufologist George Van Tassel, who claimed it could rejuvenate, provide anti-gravity, and enable time travel. Van Tassel stated he received instructions for its construction from Venusians and began building it in 1957, with the structure erected in 1959. After Van Tassel’s death, the building was acquired by sisters who now offer “sound baths” within the structure, promoting it as an acoustically perfect sound chamber. The Integratron was added to the National Register of Historic Places in April 2018.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Integratron
